name: claudebook
description: Layered, AI-friendly project documentation for Claude Code — bootstrap and maintain CLAUDE.md and .claude/docs/.

plugins.name: claudebook
plugins.description: Two slash commands — /claudebook:write and /claudebook:revise — that generate and incrementally maintain a layered documentation system (CLAUDE.md router + .claude/docs/) so Claude loads only the docs relevant to the current task and reuses existing components instead of recreating them.
